title: Verdure
description: 🌷 Enhances exploration with new flora to encounter.
body:
![team taiga banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067563768822902847/B825378A-15D5-47C1-8950-68B673893343.png)

[![verdure separator](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067562916364165271/5D221828-DDEC-495E-8F95-28F4A7EBCDFD.png)](https://github.com/MinecraftEnliven/Verdure) ## 📖 About: Verdure intends to enhance exploration by introducing new flora to encounter. It is a lightweight mod made to be pleasant on the eyes whilst still providing interesting mechanics. *An overhaul is in development, please be patient!* Some notable features include: - Daisies and clovers to add colour to your world - Rocks and pebbles to make the ground a little more unique - Enhanced tree generation, with branches and fallen leaves underneath And much more!
![verdure separator](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067562916364165271/5D221828-DDEC-495E-8F95-28F4A7EBCDFD.png) ![spoiler 1](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067563769120706651/7DC04AD9-D744-4913-9CFC-6F1BBE8F929B.png) ![spoiler 2](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067563768512512150/FE1DCA76-ED34-4EF4-B40F-566C539489FB.png) \**These images are spoilers for the next update and therefore display features not currently implemented! Keep your eyes peeled for 2.0!* ![verdure separator](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/962401391807184911/1067562916364165271/5D221828-DDEC-495E-8F95-28F4A7EBCDFD.png)
Credits: Drigonis (art)
SameButDifferent (code)
*Thank you to ebo, DoltHHaven and Carmen for contributing to 2.0!
*Also a big thanks to [inputHere](https://modrinth.com/user/inputHere) for rewriting the description for Modrinth!
